title: The Alliance Collides with Kaido’s Forces
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Sanji, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Big Mom as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It's like it's pulling him in!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We're gonna slip in too, kin'emon.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll form a team to search for momonosuke- same.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will find a way to escape on my own!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're crazy worried about him, right? Let us handle it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You should just focus on the battle!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You have my thanks...! In truth, it was hard for me to focus, pre- occupied as I was!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He looks like he wasn't able to meet any prosti- Tutes!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A brothel with no women should surely have no men!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The brothel, having received word of the chaos Luffy was causing, was nearly empty.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: This is our chance to cross!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I leave the infiltration to you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Keep an eye on the brothel windows!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: If you see any Silhou- sites...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I WON'T FORGET WHAT YOU DID, KING! PERORIV!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How is this the only way into the country!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And what's this about an alliance with the beasts pirates!?

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 37 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
